repeat_purchase_engine: Compatible system; themes; sets; community creation

primary_caution: Do not imitate studs proportions minifigure cues or trade dress

repeat_purchase_engine: Room systems; coordinated series; accessible replacement and expansion

primary_caution: A huge catalog can feel generic and room systems are not one universal interface

repeat_purchase_engine: Trust in restrained defaults; compatible storage dimensions; routine replenishment

repeat_purchase_engine: Cross-device continuity; services; accessories; account and workflow integration

repeat_purchase_engine: Character IP; series; blind boxes; editions; retail and community events

repeat_purchase_engine: Problem-by-problem home organization; recurring product series; room expansion
